6.1.title: Personal Data Protection Act 2012 (PDPA)
6.1.snippet: An Act to govern the collection, use and disclosure of personal data by organisations. Section 26 governs cross-border data transfers.

6.1.title: Personal Data Protection Regulations 2021 — Transfer Limitation Obligation
6.1.snippet: Prescribes requirements for cross-border data transfers under Section 26 of the PDPA, including  contractual safeguards and certification.

6.2.title: Personal Data Protection Act 2012 (PDPA)
6.2.snippet: An Act to govern the collection, use and disclosure of personal data. No explicit data localization requirement — conditional transfer regime only.
